code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Hero=()=>{const[roleIndex,setRoleIndex]=useState(0);const[fade,setFade]=useState(true);const roles=["CSE Student","Java & Spring Boot Developer","React Frontend Builder"];useEffect(()=>{const interval=setInterval(()=>{setFade(false);setTimeout(()=>{setRoleIndex(prev=>(prev+1)%roles.length);setFade(true);},500);},3000);return()=>clearInterval(interval);},[roles.length]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{id:"home",className:"hero",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"hero-content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"hero-eyebrow",children:"Portfolio Website"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h1",{children:["Hi, I'm ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Pasham Shivanagu Reddy"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:fade?'fade-in':'fade-out',children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"role-text",children:roles[roleIndex]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"I build clean, responsive web apps and backend systems with Java, Spring Boot, React, and a problem-solving mindset."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"hero-buttons",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:"#projects",className:"btn",children:"View My Work"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:"https://drive.google.com/file/d/1pqKuLjYrjBZkDvJBC-VSm32lWTAz3VuR/view?usp=drivesdk",target:"_blank",rel:"noopener noreferrer",className:"btn btn-outline",children:"Open Resume"})]})]})})});};export default Hero;
